Content: Raff's musical drama "Samson" will receive its world premiere on Sept. 11 2022 at the Deutsche National Theater in Weimar.
Raff's final opera "Die Eifersüchtigen" has been performed for the first time on Sept 3 in Arth (CH). The CD recording of the production will soon become available.
The opera in Bonn has scheduled an additional concert performance of Meyerbeer's "Ein Feldlager in Schlesien" on January 1, 2023.
The record label Swiss Phonogram has recorded Raff's "Samson" as a studio production in September 2023.
There are plans to record Raff's "Dame Kobold" in 2025 in Czechia.
All string quartets by Raff will be available in Edition Nordstern editions by Q2 2024.
Raff: eight pieces for piano op. 216, "Aus der Adventszeit"
